prompt: Create a luxurious Japanese magazine-style PR editorial spread for a publishing and branding service, designed as a two-page brochure layout. The left half is a dark, cinematic portrait scene in a sophisticated office lounge: a seated Japanese businessman in a navy bespoke suit, white shirt, dark tie, white pocket square, and wristwatch sits in a leather chair with one hand near his chin, posed thoughtfully beside a glossy wooden table. His face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. The lighting is moody and warm, with reflections from tall windows and a premium executive atmosphere. On this dark left page, place large elegant serif headline text in English reading {argument name="headline text" default="PUBLISHING BRANDING"}, stacked in two lines near the upper left in muted gold. Below it, add multiple lines of Japanese copy in white, including a larger subheadline and several short body paragraphs arranged vertically. Near the lower left, include a bordered dark box containing exactly 4 checklist items, each preceded by a check mark, with Japanese text. Put a small page number "02" in the bottom-left corner. The right half is a clean white editorial information page with refined minimalist typography and generous spacing. At the top, place a large Japanese headline in black, aligned upper center-right, with two short Japanese body text blocks beneath it; on the upper far right include a small photo of exactly 4 stacked hardcover books and a glass vase near a bright window with greenery. Across the middle, add a centered section title in Japanese for five benefits, followed by exactly 5 numbered columns labeled 1 through 5, each with a short Japanese heading and several lines of smaller explanatory Japanese text. Beneath that, add another centered Japanese section title for workflow, followed by exactly 4 step blocks laid out horizontally: STEP 01 with a speech bubble icon, STEP 02 with a pencil icon, STEP 03 with an open book icon, STEP 04 with a megaphone icon. Each step includes the English word STEP plus a two-digit number, a short Japanese subtitle, and a few lines of smaller Japanese description, with small chevrons between steps. Along the bottom of the right page, place exactly 3 rectangular photos side by side: a city-view office meeting table scene, a close-up of a hand writing with a pen, and a stack of books near an open book. Under these images, add a prominent Japanese closing statement in a serif style on the lower left, and a smaller Japanese paragraph on the lower right. Put page number "03" in the bottom-right corner. Use a premium palette of deep navy, black, warm brown, ivory, and muted gold, with a balance of editorial luxury, corporate trust, and high-end publishing aesthetics. The overall composition should feel like a real magazine advertisement or consulting brochure, polished, photorealistic, elegant, and credible.
translatedPrompt: 为出版与品牌服务创作一份奢华的日式杂志风格公关编辑排版，设计为双页宣传册布局。左半部分为深色电影质感的肖像场景，背景设在精致的办公休息室：一位身着海军蓝定制西装、白衬衫、深色领带、白色口袋巾并佩戴腕表的日本商务人士，坐在皮椅上，单手托腮，姿态沉思，身旁是一张光亮的木质桌子。他的面部经过柔和的矩形模糊处理。灯光氛围感强且温暖，伴有落地窗的倒影，营造出高级行政氛围。在此深色左页上，放置醒目优雅的衬线英文标题 {argument name="headline text" default="PUBLISHING BRANDING"}，以哑光金色分两行堆叠在左上方。下方添加多行白色日文文案，包括一个较大的副标题和几段垂直排列的简短正文。左下角附近包含一个带边框的深色方框，内含 4 个带勾选标记的清单项，并配有日文文本。左下角放置页码“02”。右半部分为简洁的白色编辑信息页，采用精致的极简主义排版和宽裕的留白。顶部中央偏右处放置一个醒目的黑色日文大标题，下方配有两个简短的日文正文块；右上角包含一张小图，展示 4 本堆叠的精装书和一个靠近明亮窗户及绿植的玻璃花瓶。页面中部添加一个居中的日文五大优势标题，下方排列 5 个编号列（1 至 5），每列包含简短的日文标题及几行较小的日文说明文字。下方添加另一个居中的日文工作流程标题，随后横向排列 4 个步骤块：STEP 01 配有对话气泡图标，STEP 02 配有铅笔图标，STEP 03 配有打开的书本图标，STEP 04 配有扩音器图标。每个步骤包含英文单词 STEP 及两位数编号、简短的日文副标题和几行较小的日文描述，步骤之间以小箭头连接。右页底部并排放置 3 张矩形照片：城市景观办公会议桌场景、手持钢笔书写的特写，以及靠近打开书本的一叠书籍。在这些图片下方，左侧添加一段醒目的衬线风格日文结语，右侧添加一段较小的日文段落。右下角放置页码“03”。采用深海军蓝、黑、暖棕、象牙白和哑光金的高级配色，平衡编辑奢华感、企业信任度与高端出版美学。整体构图应呈现出真实杂志广告或咨询手册的质感，精致、写实、优雅且具有公信力。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华出版与品牌推广编辑排版：此提示词旨在生成高端日式杂志风格的双页宣传排版，适用于出版与品牌服务，是宣传册、公关视觉图及企业营销的理想选择。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 86；构图: centered, close-up, vertical, horizontal；风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
